p.c: function[T0: CommRing](x0: Ideal[T0], x1: Ideal[T0]) { Set.new[T0](ideal_product_generators_contains[T0](x0, x1)) = ideal_product_generators[T0](x0, x1) }[R](i, j)

goal: ideal_product_generators_contains(i, j, x) = exists(k0: R, k1: R) { i.contains(k0) and j.contains(k1) and x = k0 * k1 }
